title: Mutual - Find your mentor
description:
Hey everyone !

Mutual is a mentoring app that brings together a variety of mentees and mentors under one roof. The app allows mentees to connect with experts in various industries and mentors to share their expertise in a variety of ways. The program also offers a community for users to help them discover what they're looking for and a platform for mentors to create lectures or clips and share them with a broader audience.

Let me know what you guys think!

Overview

Hey everyone !

Mutual is a mentoring app that brings together a variety of mentees and mentors under one roof. The app allows mentees to connect with experts in various industries and mentors to share their expertise in a variety of ways. The program also offers a community for users to help them discover what they're looking for and a platform for mentors to create lectures or clips and share them with a broader audience.

Let me know what you guys think!
